title: Senior Full Stack ABAP/UI5 Developer
description: We are excited to announce an opportunity for a dedicated and experienced Senior Full Stack ABAP/UI5 Developer to join our team. The ideal candidate will be engaged in a high-impact project based on SAP CRM, with ABAP backend and SAP UI5 frontend technologies. If you possess a combination of in-depth SAP development expertise and a passion for crafting robust solutions in a dynamic environment, we would love to welcome you on board. This is a fantastic chance to leverage your technical skills, collaborate with skilled professionals, and contribute to the advancement of our client’s critical systems. Responsibilities Develop and optimize custom build application using ABAP Objects, oData and SAP UI5 Implement and manage backend services with oData and CDS Views Enhance user interfaces using SAP UI5 Perform unit testing for ABAP and UI5 components Collaborate with teams to integrate solutions and support system maintenance Requirements 5+ years in SAP development with ABAP Objects and SAP UI5 expertise Strong experience in SAP CRM English level: Upper-Intermediate (B2) or higher We offer CONTINUOUS UPSKILLING, LEARNING & DEVELOPMENT Diversity of tasks and projects Assessment center for objective review of competency level Personal development plan Mentoring programs and leadership development Certification and professional development support Access to learning platforms including more than 2,500 internal courses and the LinkedIn Learning library with 20,000+ courses English courses taught by certified teachers CORPORATE BENEFITS Extra leave days Referral bonuses COMPENSATION PACKAGE Competitive compensation paid in USD Regular salary and performance reviews MEDICAL & HEALTHCARE Private health insurance Well-being events WORKING ENVIRONMENT Recreation areas and kitchens Tea, coffee, and snacks Well-being events Sports equipment and game consoles IT Equipment Microsoft's Software Assurance Home Use Program (HUP) EPAM is a leading global provider of digital platform engineering and development services. We are committed to having a positive impact on our customers, our employees, and our communities. We embrace a dynamic and inclusive culture. Here you will collaborate with multi-national teams, contribute to a myriad of innovative projects that deliver the most creative and cutting-edge solutions, and have an opportunity to continuously learn and grow. No matter where you are located, you will join a dedicated, creative, and diverse community that will help you discover your fullest potential. Please note that our Talent Attraction Team reviews applications and CVs submitted in English.

title: Freelance Laravel Geliştirici -Devops
description: Aradığımız uzman Freelance çalışacak ve 7/24 saat sorun olduğunda hemen müdahale edecek  kişi olacaktır. İki kişi alınacaktır. Teknoloji odaklı projeler geliştiren ekibimize katılacak, sistemlerin kesintisiz ve güvenli şekilde çalışmasını sağlayacak deneyimli bir DevOps Uzmanı arıyoruz. Projelerimizde backentte larawel ve Nestjs kullanılmaktadır. CI/CD süreçlerinin yönetimi, sunucu altyapılarının optimizasyonu ve otomasyon çözümlerinin geliştirilmesinde aktif rol alacak ve backentte var olan ve olabilecek sorunları en hızlı şekilde çözecek ekip arkadaşı arıyoruz. Projelerimiz Turhostda fiziki sunucularımızda bulunmaktadır. Test ortamı için ve canlı için birer sunucumuz mevcuttur.Backentte oluşacak veya seocuların istedikleri yapılacak ve sunucuların ve web sitelerimizin sorunsuz çalışmaları sağlanacaktır. Başlangıçta projede yapılacak trello maddeleri ve istenilen sayfalar, mailing, mesaj ve bildirimler yapılacak sonrasında frontend tarafının istedikleri ve seocularımızın talepleri yapılacak ,sorun olduğunda anlık müdahale edip çözecek saat sorunu olmadan ulaşabilecegimiz danışman olarak uzun yıllar devam edebileceğimiz arkadaşların müracaatlarını bekliyoruz. Görev ve Sorumluluklar CI/CD süreçlerini kurmak, yönetmek ve iyileştirmek Sunucu ve altyapı sistemlerinin kurulumu, izlenmesi ve yönetimi Docker, Kubernetes gibi konteyner teknolojileri ile sistemlerin yönetimi Bulut altyapılarında (AWS, GCP, Azure vb.) sistem yönetimi ve optimizasyonu Yazılım geliştirme ekipleri ile koordineli çalışarak deployment süreçlerini hızlandırmak Sistem güvenliği, performans ve ölçeklenebilirlik konularında iyileştirmeler yapmak Monitoring ve loglama sistemlerini kurmak ve yönetmek Aranan Nitelikler DevOps veya Sistem Yönetimi alanında en az 4 yıl deneyim Laravel backentte en az 5 yıl deneyim Linux sunucu yönetimi konusunda bilgi sahibi PostgreSQL deneyimi GraphQL bilgisi CI/CD araçları (Jenkins, GitLab CI, GitHub Actions vb.) konusunda deneyimli Docker ve tercihen Kubernetes bilgisi olan Cloud servisleri (AWS, Google Cloud, Azure) hakkında bilgi sahibi Analitik düşünme yeteneği güçlü, problem çözme becerisi yüksek Takım çalışmasına yatkın Büyük ve karmaşık projelerde çalışma deneyimi Temiz kod yazma prensibine sahip olmak ve güçlü problem çözme becerileri

title: Java / Node.js Engineering Team Lead with SAP Experience
description: We are seeking a talented Java / Node.js Development Team Lead with proficiency in SAP . Become a part of EPAM and contribute to developing and supporting applications within the SAP Business Technology Platform. Your role will also involve providing technical leadership to the team. Apply if you are ready for new challenges! Responsibilities Conduct code reviews and develop features based on best software development practices, ensuring clean code and clean design Monitor applications, troubleshoot issues and resolve bugs Write technical and user documentation Cooperate with the team, track its performance and needs Collaborate with customers and stakeholders on technical topics, provide required metrics to management Participate in the setup, improvement and implementation of development processes Provide design and architectural decisions Requirements Strong knowledge of Java 8 RESTful architecture expertise, including JAX-RS (Jersey, Apache CXF) Flexibility to use JPA (EclipseLink) and Spring Boot, covering MVC, Data, Security and WebFlux Proficiency in design principles and competency in microservice architecture Familiarity with Agile methodologies (Scrum, Kanban, etc.) Basic understanding of JavaScript and Node.js Work experience or theoretical knowledge of SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP), HANA database and SAP CAP (Java, Node.js) English language level – B2 and higher We offer CONTINUOUS UPSKILLING, LEARNING & DEVELOPMENT Diversity of tasks and projects Assessment center for objective review of competency level Personal development plan Mentoring programs and leadership development Certification and professional development support Access to learning platforms including more than 2,500 internal courses and the LinkedIn Learning library with 20,000+ courses English courses taught by certified teachers CORPORATE BENEFITS Extra leave days Referral bonuses COMPENSATION PACKAGE Competitive compensation paid in USD Regular salary and performance reviews MEDICAL & HEALTHCARE Private health insurance Well-being events WORKING ENVIRONMENT Recreation areas and kitchens Tea, coffee, and snacks Well-being events Sports equipment and game consoles IT Equipment Microsoft's Software Assurance Home Use Program (HUP) EPAM is a leading global provider of digital platform engineering and development services. We are committed to having a positive impact on our customers, our employees, and our communities. We embrace a dynamic and inclusive culture. Here you will collaborate with multi-national teams, contribute to a myriad of innovative projects that deliver the most creative and cutting-edge solutions, and have an opportunity to continuously learn and grow. No matter where you are located, you will join a dedicated, creative, and diverse community that will help you discover your fullest potential. Please note that our Talent Attraction Team reviews applications and CVs submitted in English.
